message:
docs(tantivy): Fix edge n-gram length comment (max is 21, not 20)

The code actually generates n-grams of length 2..=21 (for words with
21+ chars), not 2..=20 as the comment stated. Fixed the constant
documentation and inline comment to accurately reflect the behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
